title: Re-order conditional question data when exporting forms
excerpt:
I have created a form with lots of conditional questions and now when reviewing the answers in a board they aren’t in the correct order. 
Some conditional questions appear at the end of the board which makes it very hard…

posts.author: paigeGAIN (Paige Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have created a form with lots of conditional questions and now when reviewing the answers in a board they aren’t in the correct order.

Some conditional questions appear at the end of the board which makes it very hard to evaluate the feedback.

I just need to be able to see the questions in order, with conditional answers in the correct space.

I hope someone can help!

posts.author: LKat (Laura Katterhenry)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Paige. You should be able to drag the questions using the 8 dot grab button or the up and down arrows when you click on your conditional question:

Screenshot 2025-04-07 at 2.22.51 PM1158×368 20 KB
